Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

TOML (Tom's Obvious Minimal Language) is a configuration file format that maps unambiguously to hash tables. See TOML v1.0.0.

Usage:

String toml = TomlSerializer.DEFAULT.serialize(myBean); MyBean bean = TomlParser.DEFAULT.parse(toml, MyBean.class); // Or use the marshaller: String toml = Toml.of(myBean); MyBean bean = Toml.to(toml, MyBean.class);

    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    TomlConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in TomlSerializer and TomlParser.
    TomlConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @TomlConfig annotation.
    TomlConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies TomlConfig annotations to a TomlParser.Builder.
    TomlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies TomlConfig annotations to a TomlSerializer.Builder.
    TomlParser
    Parses TOML v1.0.0 text into POJOs.
    TomlParser.Builder
    Builder for TomlParser.
    TomlParserSession
    Session for parsing TOML into POJOs.
    TomlParserSession.Builder
    Builder for TOML parser session.
    TomlSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to TOML v1.0.0 format.
    TomlSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    TomlSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to TOML format.
    TomlSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder for TOML serializer session.
    TomlWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing TOML v1.0.0.
